languages.text: "Клинок, созданный эльдарами и названный Багряной пляской Кхейна. Реликвия происходит из эпохи до падения этой ущербной расы и имеет историческую ценность — не то чтобы примитивные люди могли в полной мере осознать это... скорее Себерианом вело тщеславие и жажда идти против собственных владык".

traits.locale_text: "Клинок, созданный эльдарами и названный Багряной пляской Кхейна. Реликвия происходит из эпохи до падения этой ущербной расы и имеет историческую ценность — не то чтобы примитивные люди могли в полной мере осознать это... скорее Себерианом вело тщеславие и жажда идти против собственных владык".

languages.text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."
languages.original_text: "Клинок, созданный эльдарами и названный Багряной пляской Кхейна. Реликвия происходит из эпохи до падения этой ущербной расы и имеет историческую ценность — не то чтобы примитивные люди могли в полной мере осознать это... скорее Себерианом вело тщеславие и жажда идти против собственных владык".

traits.locale_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

"A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

"The blade dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. An Iltyr relic from an epoch long before the Fall of the Empire. A powerful weapon in the eyes of primitives, but its true value lies in its historical significance."

"A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

"A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

languages.text: «Una espada de fabricación Aeldari conocida como la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Esta reliquia data de antes de la caída de esa especie tan defectuosa. Tiene un gran valor histórico, aunque ningún humano sería consciente de ello. No, a Seberian lo impulsaron su codicia y sus deseos de oponerse a sus superiores».
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: «Una espada de fabricación Aeldari conocida como la Danza Carmesí de Khaine. Esta reliquia data de antes de la caída de esa especie tan defectuosa. Tiene un gran valor histórico, aunque ningún humano sería consciente de ello. No, a Seberian lo impulsaron su codicia y sus deseos de oponerse a sus superiores».

languages.text: “一把艾达灵族打造的剑，名为“凯恩的猩红之舞”。这件圣物出自那个劣等种族陨落之前的时代。它具有历史价值——不过这一点原始人类无从理解。至于塞贝里安，驱使他的更多是虚荣心，以及试图对抗其主人的欲望。”
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: “一把艾达灵族打造的剑，名为“凯恩的猩红之舞”。这件圣物出自那个劣等种族陨落之前的时代。它具有历史价值——不过这一点原始人类无从理解。至于塞贝里安，驱使他的更多是虚荣心，以及试图对抗其主人的欲望。”

languages.text: « Une lame de fabrication aeldarie, surnommée la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Il s'agit d'un reliquat d'une époque précédant la chute des espèces inférieures. Cet objet possède une valeur historique, bien que les humains primitifs ne puissent la percevoir. Non, Seberian était davantage mû par sa propre vanité et son désir de défier ses maîtres. »
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: « Une lame de fabrication aeldarie, surnommée la Danse écarlate de Khaine. Il s'agit d'un reliquat d'une époque précédant la chute des espèces inférieures. Cet objet possède une valeur historique, bien que les humains primitifs ne puissent la percevoir. Non, Seberian était davantage mû par sa propre vanité et son désir de défier ses maîtres. »

languages.text: "Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı olarak adlandırılan Aeldari yapımı bir kılıç. Bu kusurlu türün düşüşünden önceki bir çağa ait bir yadigâr. Tarihî bir değeri var. İlkel bir insanın bunu algılayabilmesinden değil. Hayır, Seberian daha çok kendi kibrinden ve efendilerine karşı gelme arzusundan güç alıyordu."
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: "Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı olarak adlandırılan Aeldari yapımı bir kılıç. Bu kusurlu türün düşüşünden önceki bir çağa ait bir yadigâr. Tarihî bir değeri var. İlkel bir insanın bunu algılayabilmesinden değil. Hayır, Seberian daha çok kendi kibrinden ve efendilerine karşı gelme arzusundan güç alıyordu."

languages.text: 「アエルダリの作った刀、カイヌの赤い舞踏。その種族が滅亡する前の時代のものである。歴史的価値がある。だが、原始的な人間には理解できないだろう。セベリアンは、自分のプライドと、主人に逆らうという欲求に駆られていたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: 「アエルダリの作った刀、カイヌの赤い舞踏。その種族が滅亡する前の時代のものである。歴史的価値がある。だが、原始的な人間には理解できないだろう。セベリアンは、自分のプライドと、主人に逆らうという欲求に駆られていたのだ。」

languages.text: "Die Klinge der Aeldari mit dem Namen 'Blutroter Tanz von Khaine'. Ein Relikt aus einer Epoche vor dem Fall dieser fehlerhaften Spezies. Sie ist von historischem Wert — was ein primitiver Mensch natürlich nicht erkennen kann. Nein, Seberian folgte eher seiner Eitelkeit als dem Wunsch, sich gegen seine Meister zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "A blade of Aeldari creation, dubbed the Crimson Dance of Khaine. A relic from an epoch before the fall of that flawed species. It has historical value — not that a primitive human could perceive it. No, Seberian was driven more by his vanity and desire to oppose his masters."

traits.locale_text: "Die Klinge der Aeldari mit dem Namen 'Blutroter Tanz von Khaine'. Ein Relikt aus einer Epoche vor dem Fall dieser fehlerhaften Spezies. Sie ist von historischem Wert — was ein primitiver Mensch natürlich nicht erkennen kann. Nein, Seberian folgte eher seiner Eitelkeit als dem Wunsch, sich gegen seine Meister zu stellen."
